emails.subject: Cedar Resources
emails.body: Cedar Resources There were two Cedar Resource deals: No. 1 12/1/2000 through 11/30/2002 (two years) 1000/month $4.83/dth No. 2 12/1/2000 through 11/30/2001 (one year) 1500/month $5.30/dth Hope this helps. Jim
